samples.comment: Maybe having an actual person handle this type of request would be more beneficial for both parties

First answer, AI-generated, did not give a solution and it actually repeated my question. The second answer still did not give a solution,  but at least told me that someone is working on the solution

AI responses are not very helpful; feel that a personalized grill could be a great opportunity market your product as I’m sure there’s a demand for this. If there’s a phone number I can call, I’d be happy to speak with someone about a personalized Spark Cab grill or an extra grill. More than willing to pay what it costs to send an extra grill. I can also do a promo video for this product (and more), if that helps; I love the Spark link/Spark link XLR and would love to promote them! Thanks for reading and hope to hear back:)

AI is dumb, plenty of harmonica players are using the spark go
Why can’t we have real humans answering a simple question

Wrong answer by dumb AI.
I try today and it works perfectly

If you sell something as a matching cab to the Spark 2 amp, then the cab should actually match it both in tolex/vinyl color and sheen and in the grill cloth. Who wants a “matching” cabinet that does not match the amp? I think this is basic logic that somehow Positive Grid seems to want to ignore. You should make your suppliers match the amp that they are making the cabinet to match. Like I said, this is basic. Do you think Fender or Marshall or Orange or Vox would make a cabinet that doesn’t match the amp? I can’t believe a company in this business wouldn’t know this. I will never recommend Positive Grid products. Your philosophy is just stupid.
I can query an Ai myself, when I contact support I don't want to talk to an ai

Very poor. Faulty software product that doesn’t meet the standard advertised. Sent at AI response that failed to deal with my issues. Very disappointed with Positive Grid after being a loyal customer for several years.
It did not help. I bought the item with a different email/account name then I use on my app. I need to know how to change that or get my money back

Hi, I'm writing regarding my recent order for a Spark Mini. I had specifically selected the Pearl (white cabinet) finish in my personalisation along with the grill, but the unit delivered is a black Spark Mini — incorrect colour.
As this item is being carried to India by someone travelling from the US, I need this exchange resolved urgently before their departure. Could you please advise on the fastest available option to process this?
AI generated the reply and it wasn’t 100% accurate. Would prefer to have the choice of an actual real life representative to answer my question.

the promotion THIS WEEK email received on Monday April 27, was OVER by the time I tried to order a Spark Cab on Friday. There was no mention when the promotion ended. One might even consider it including the Saturday or end Sunday. Sale price was $339 Canadian, Original Price $399. I didn't notice until after Check Out process that the price was $399. When I got a response I received a Code for $10 off. Well, the Sales was $60 off. I will wait for another promotion.
The AI support does not provide quality feedback or instructions on how to fix issues. I would rather speak with an actual rep
Product did not work o. My device... and the company refused to give me a refund so basicly they took 108 dollars from me and wasted my time for 3 weeks with emails thatnks for nothing
An AI response? Really? To a simple question that would have benefited from something human. Corporate.
AI canned response.  Such bullshit support
I repeat too much the same information, with bot, then with human
It didn't say of there are any plans to offer a cover for Spark Cab, it only told me there isn't one available now.

I asked why not put the Spark Go on sale if you were flash selling the carry bag as just buying the carry bag for $13 meant paying $8 for shipping. The response was to buy the Spark Go at full price with the bag and qualify for free shipping. Though this statement is correct, it did not resolve my request and I can understand the request of a discount code could not be done but still left unsatisfied. If both products had been on sale I would have purchased both, instead I bought nothing.
Great to have a response even if it was a robot

allComments.comment: Lack of a solution to update your product using latest Windows 11 system.
Maybe having an actual person handle this type of request would be more beneficial for both parties

First answer, AI-generated, did not give a solution and it actually repeated my question. The second answer still did not give a solution,  but at least told me that someone is working on the solution

AI responses are not very helpful; feel that a personalized grill could be a great opportunity market your product as I’m sure there’s a demand for this. If there’s a phone number I can call, I’d be happy to speak with someone about a personalized Spark Cab grill or an extra grill. More than willing to pay what it costs to send an extra grill. I can also do a promo video for this product (and more), if that helps; I love the Spark link/Spark link XLR and would love to promote them! Thanks for reading and hope to hear back:)

I bought the Hendrix extra, it’s been over 3 weeks and NOT working!!! Took my money just fcking fine and been fooling around all this time with no solution.You need a person that knows how to do a return and start over. Walmart employees can accomplish this, not you people!!!

I only rated you satisfactory because the issue was not fixed.  The reply was very fast and I was told you are working on fixing the issue.  I hope it will not take a long time to fix the glitch you have with Windows 11 Version 25H2 updating.  Once the fix is completed and working,  I would change my rating to VERY SATISFIED.

I purchased my PG product secondhand through legitimate means, and have extensive proof of ownership, yet the already-registered serial cannot be transferred to me, meaning I do not get any associated benefits of having the product registered in my name. Other companies in the music gear space can handle this just fine.

I feel the support for positive grid is very old support.. no modern technologies involved.. being able to support someone through text messages, social media like Facebook Messenger, life support. OR EVEN PHONE CALLS!! For a company this big it is unacceptable. Not to mention returning things is very difficult.. old school way. For modern company like this they should have better options for support, returning things.. not satisfied at all..

AI is dumb, plenty of harmonica players are using the spark go
Why can’t we have real humans answering a simple question

Wrong answer by dumb AI.
I try today and it works perfectly
This process has been ridiculous. I have a legitimate question about my PG product and I haven't yet had anyone hear it and provide an answer. I did everything asked of me, I just need a resolution

I'm not sure how feasible this is but, ideally, you should test software such as your firmware updates on the windows 11 updates before they get released to the general public. Not sure if Microsoft have this facility for software houses though.
But it was very fast and friendly.

If you sell something as a matching cab to the Spark 2 amp, then the cab should actually match it both in tolex/vinyl color and sheen and in the grill cloth. Do you think Fender or Marshall or Orange or Vox would make a cabinet that doesn’t match the amp? I can’t believe a company in this business wouldn’t know this. I will never recommend Positive Grid products. Your philosophy is just stupid.
no clear
It's quite unbelievable that you can't update the firmware through IOS when use of a ipad is so prevalent.

I understand that someone registering and then returning an item involves a few extra steps but I purchased directly from Amazon so the solution of contacting the person who purchased before me is not an option. Truthfully being told I have no warranty extended to my purchase sours me on the whole process.

When it comes to replacing it a defective USB-C cord, I'm sorry, but the process as bad as it was actually could've been worse because I decided I wasn't going to do any of the things that was asked of me. It was like you were asking me to jump through hoops for a USB-C cord that should be working out of the box with my XLR link.

The problem has been solved, but I can't be impressed with this.

I was able to fix issue myself.
Can’t update the firmware on the device to access some of the advertised sonic features until a 3rd party (Microsoft) modifies their software.
I thought you'd have a carry case for the Spark Edge - but you don't
It didn't say of there are any plans to offer a cover for Spark Cab, it only told me there isn't one available now.

I asked why not put the Spark Go on sale if you were flash selling the carry bag as just buying the carry bag for $13 meant paying $8 for shipping. The response was to buy the Spark Go at full price with the bag and qualify for free shipping. Though this statement is correct, it did not resolve my request and I can understand the request of a discount code could not be done but still left unsatisfied. If both products had been on sale I would have purchased both, instead I bought nothing.
Great to have a response even if it was a robot

I am very disappointed that I bought a Spark 2 and Spark Cab, and found out afterward that the grilles don’t match. There’s a reason that the Spark Cab matched the Spark 40, people expect matching products. I think the Spark Cab should’ve been updated when the Spark 2 was introduced. Now I’m trying to find third party solutions for this.
Great to have a response even if it was a robot, but no definite answer
I was looking for a discount that I missed and the answer was a simple no... instead I have found coupons for at least 15 dollars discounts

I understand that it is your company policy, so there may be nothing that can be done. However, I hope you would also consider secondhand buyers.

If the seller of a used product can no longer be contacted and is therefore unable to unregister the device, that is not the fault of the new buyer, is it?

I wanted to change the delivery address and despite the package not being shipped, it was still
Sent to the wrong address dine time after.

I need a two dollar part.  Cheap parts from China that you guys dont even sell.  Your advice was to send it somewhere for repair....for a 2 dollar part!  Had to source it in my own and will try to repair.  You should at least be a resource for Parts procurement

It took a long time for support to reply between messages, after doing many things you asked for the answer was return it to Amazon and then the $20 credit you gave me couldn't be used for the only item I wanted  to purchase.

Response time was fine...though don't know why I needed to 'verify' my email (don't tell me about security).  Simply don't understand how a product this otherwise advanced has such tiny controls...at least have a slider bar option.  And a bit in disbelief there is a laptop version either.
Have real people get back to us, not AI

It stated "yes we understand/ know the problem". Then irritatingly suggested the workaround that I gave it. Yes it works but standing on stage,  pressing the volume pedal, restarting the app, reconnecting everything just to see that the volume is still wrong is stupid. If your Control X gave me more control over Input 2 (not just Input 1) then I could use EQ in multiple presents.  Your stuff is clever but not clever enough.
Would've  given 5 stars if not A.I. ! Not a fan of a.i. was only 3 days late for go case deal , real person would let it slide as I've bought so much of your gear.
Why don’t you sell the adaptor chords separately. It is ridiculous.

Disappointed in product having an issue and having to find packaging to ship was unfortunate. It would’ve been a lot nicer if new item was shipped so my son could use what I bought for him and then got to ship back in the correct box. We did nothing wrong and were hurt by it.
